rules.rule: Major page layouts should resolve to a modular grid or consistent column logic.
Related controls and content should be grouped primarily through proximity before decorative separators are added.
Components should align to stable vertical and horizontal edges; arbitrary offsets require explicit justification.
Text-heavy surfaces should preserve a repeatable baseline rhythm across headings, body copy, and metadata.
Spacing decisions should come from a finite scale rather than one-off visual nudges.
